series_metadata.series_title: OGS Data Center Time Biling Records
series_metadata.series_description: Reports & other records from OGS detailing charges for use of the Office of General Services computer services including monthly billing reports, copies of vouchers and bills.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State & audit report is released & all descrepancies are resolved, then destroy., Paper: Shred
